item.title: Your yearly reminder ti NOT donate to the Salvation Army
item.description: https://augsburgecho.com/2021/12/13/heres-why-you-shouldnt-donate-to-the-salvation-army/ https://medium.com/the-radical-center/why-you-shouldnt-donate-to-the-salvation-army-ever-f2cb2e43a2c https://ashevilleblade.com/?p=4827 https://www.lex18.com/news/lexington-salvation-army-leader-shared-anti-lgbtq-message-sunday There are lots more.....
item.dc:creator: MightUrto

item.title: "Unions are great, so long as they don't ask for stuff or stand up to corporations"
item.description: "But but but..... a recession hurts all workers" Well Damn Jackie, sounds like to avoid a recession congress should have forced the billion dollar corporations to give employees a few sick days, rather than destroy a workers movement and force the railway employees to work without a single sick day, right in the middle of a global fucking pandemic. Absolutely insane how this is being portrayed as "workers vs the economy", rather than "workers vs greedy rail corporations who made more than 27 billion dollars last year" (originally posted by @AoShin on 2022-12-02 23:56:34)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: A devoted loyal bond between a fox and a dog. The orphaned wild Japanese fox has been with the dog since she was a kid. Despite having her own kids now , she never once left the dog ‘s side when the dog became sick , till the very end ….
item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: Cats eyes glow because they have a special layer in their eyes called the tapetum lucidum, which acts like a mirror, bouncing incoming light back…

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1042 (sea creepy edition)
item.description:
Dawn has come. The ancient sea has gone, but apparently, it's supposed to be crab Meme day, so here's some Ancient and modern Ocean creepy crawlies for you. Blame @BottomShelfVodka for this one.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hello. Good morning. Hi cutie."

item.title: I'm out of videos, you get what you dump 100
item.description: 100 dumps in, I feel blessed. 80000 glorious fake Internet points worth Babillions! Glory, accolades, goth girls and all a boy or girl could ever dream of in a short anonymous avatar life. Thank you all
item.dc:creator: joeurmaumalikesme7

item.title: For my cakeday, here’s my most referenced favorite
item.description: I make this recipe at least once a month. I jokingly call it bone snap chicken because of the crisp crack when you bite into it. Bone apple teeth!
item.dc:creator: hogaboomer
